name: Bass Odyssey -  Andy C & Harriet Jaxxon
description:
Bass Odyssey returns to Vulkan Arena following a massive debut in March. This time we're bringing one of the greatest names in Drum & Bass history to Oslo, Andy C.
Joining him is Harriet Jaxxon, one of the most exciting rising stars in Drum & Bass today. Fresh from acclaimed Boiler Room performances, both artists are ready to take over Vulkan Arena for a night of world-class Drum & Bass.

ANDY C
Andy C is a true Drum & Bass legend and is widely regarded as one of the most influential DJs the genre has ever seen. As the founder of Ram Records, he has helped shape the sound of modern Drum & Bass while launching the careers of artists such as Chase & Status, Sub Focus and Wilkinson.
Across a career spanning more than three decades, Andy C has sold out iconic venues including Wembley Arena, Brixton Academy and Alexandra Palace, while headlining major festivals such as Glastonbury, Creamfields, EDC and Boomtown. Renowned for his unmatched technical ability, lightning-fast mixing and exclusive dubplates, he continues to set the benchmark for DJ performance.
Andy C recently made his long-awaited Boiler Room debut, further proving that he remains at the very forefront of the global Drum & Bass scene. With countless awards and an uncompromising passion for the music, every Andy C performance is a masterclass in energy, precision and pure Drum & Bass.

HARRIET JAXXON
Harriet Jaxxon is one of the most exciting names in the new generation of Drum & Bass. Rooted in the genre but never confined by it, she is known for high-energy DJ sets that seamlessly blend timeless classics with cutting-edge sounds.
A two-time winner of the Best Female DJ award at the D&B Awards, Harriet has amassed millions of streams and released music on renowned labels including Hospital Records and Souped Up. Alongside her DJ career, she has become a respected voice on stations such as BBC Radio 1, Rinse FM and Capital FM, while also running her own club brand, TRAXX.
From Glastonbury to Amnesia Ibiza, Harriet has performed on some of the world's biggest stages. With flawless mixing, fearless track selection and infectious energy behind the decks, she delivers Drum & Bass exactly as it should be experienced—raw, unpredictable and unforgettable.
